rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. RAY K. SHAHANI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 3, 2014, line 13. DEFENDANT RAY SHAHANI's DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Fourth Amended Complaint sufficiently explains previously identified discrepancy. What is and is not customary for one company to do is a factual issue not appropriate for determination on demurrer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MCCORMACK BARON RAGAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. VS. JOYCE ALLEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Relief From Forfeiture Due To Hardship
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 3, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT JOYCE ALLEN and TALIKA FLETCHER's Petition For Relief From Forfeiture Due To Hardship Hearing required for defendants to produce doctors' declarations regarding defendants' conditions; produce evidence regarding Ds' income; produce evidence regarding recertification requests; produce evidence regarding housing search. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SPINDLER PROPERTIES, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. ALISON C WRIGHT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Appearances: Atty. Clifford Fried (415-421-0100) appearing for Plaintiff Spindler Properties and moving party/ Atty, Raquel Fox (415-771-9850) appearing for Defendant Alison Wright and opposing party ARGUED - Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument tentative ruling is adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF SPINDLER PROPERTIES' Motion To Tax Costs is DENIED. Defendants are the prevailing parties; costs are necessary and reasonable. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported. (501)

rulings.Case Title: SPINDEL PROPERTIES , LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. JAMES H THORNTON III et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 3, 2014, line 6. PLAINTIFF SPINDEL PROPERTIES, LLC's Motion To Tax Costs DENIED. Defendants are the prevailing parties; costs are necessary and reasonable. Defendants are the prevailing parties; costs are necessary and reasonable. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MVP I, LLC VS. NEIL BARDACH et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 3, 2014, line 10. DEFENDANT NEIL BARDACH and ANDREA BARDACH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Notice does not provide for any method of payment that can be made personally. Defendant does not cite any authority for the position that presumption established by CCP 1161 regarding mailing must be stated in the Notice to Pay rent or Quit. = (501/REQ)
